title: CXBPO quality and routing system
prompt: Create a 16:9 premium light-mode CXBPO quality-and-routing visual system for TSI. White and soft blue surface with subtle warm neutral cards, TSI dark blue #001E41 routing structure, TSI bright blue #4396F6 signal paths, green quality pass states, orange exception routing. Abstract contact-center operations without stock photos: queues, channels, QA checkpoints, coaching loop, and right-shore routing as elegant geometric modules. Minimal generic UI labels only, no fake customer data. Sophisticated, calm, modern, executive. Leave upper-left logo-safe space. No logos, no watermarks, no names, no phone numbers, no account data, no distressed customers.
notes: Light CX operations direction with synthetic operational labels only.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
